project.name: azure_cheat_sheets
project.description: A group of documents/files that explain Azure concepts in related groups. Pure documentation repository with Azure cheat sheets for the AZ-204 exam (Designing Microsoft Azure Infrastructure Solutions).

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Instructs AI agents (Hermes, GitHub Copilot, Codex, etc.) on how to orient themselves in this repository. Defines a decision order for code tasks using tools like codegraph, graphify, and understand-anything.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains bash code blocks and HTML comment delimiters for graph-tools sections.

nodes.name: LICENSE
nodes.summary: The software license file for the azure_cheat_sheets repository. Defines the legal terms under which the content may be used, modified, and distributed.
nodes.languageNotes: Standard license text, no special formatting.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: The main README for the azure_cheat_sheets project. Briefly describes the repository as a collection of documents explaining Azure concepts in related groups.
nodes.languageNotes: Minimal content — just a title and one-line description.

nodes.name: Copilot Instructions
nodes.summary: Configures GitHub Copilot behavior for the repository, instructing it to use CodeGraph tools first for symbol lookup and context gathering before falling back to grep or file reading.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains bash code blocks and HTML comment delimiters for graph-tools sections.

nodes.name: Azure Cheat Sheet
nodes.summary: A comprehensive Azure cheat sheet targeting the AZ-204 exam, covering Networking, Security, Storage, Monitoring & Observability, Compute, Identity & Access, High Availability & Disaster Recovery, and Governance. Focuses on architectural decision-making — which service to use, why, and when.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of tables for service comparisons and Mermaid flowchart diagrams for decision flows.

edges.label: README references main cheat sheet content

layers.name: Project Meta
layers.description: Project-level metadata files including overview, legal, AI agent instructions, and editor/tool configuration

layers.name: Content
layers.description: Primary documentation content — Azure exam cheat sheets and study material

tour.title: azure_cheat_sheets Repository Tour
tour.description: This tour walks a new contributor through the repository from high-level project metadata and AI-assistant guidance to the core AZ-204 study material. Follow it in order to understand what the repo is for, how automated tools are expected to work in it, and where the main Azure content lives.

stops.title: Start with the Repository Overview
stops.description: Begin at the README to get the shortest possible orientation to the project. It tells you that this repository is a collection of Azure concept documents, and it establishes the main expectation that the real value of the repo lives in the documentation rather than application code.

stops.title: Learn How AI Agents Should Navigate the Repo
stops.description: Next, read AGENTS.md to understand the repository's operating instructions for AI tooling. This file matters because it defines how agents should gather context, which analysis tools to prefer, and how to approach tasks safely and consistently inside this documentation-focused project.

stops.title: Review GitHub Copilot Repository Guidance
stops.description: After the general agent instructions, inspect the Copilot-specific configuration to see how editor-integrated AI is expected to behave. This stop helps you understand the workflow assumptions behind code and content assistance, especially the preference for graph-aware lookup before falling back to raw file search.

stops.title: Check the Legal Usage Terms
stops.description: Before reusing or redistributing the material, read the LICENSE file to understand the legal boundaries of the repository. For a documentation repo like this, the license is important because the primary artifact is written content that others may want to copy, adapt, or share.

stops.title: Dive into the Main AZ-204 Cheat Sheet
stops.description: Finish with the central document of the repository: the Azure Cheat Sheet. This is the core learning resource, covering major AZ-204 domains such as networking, security, storage, monitoring, compute, identity, disaster recovery, and governance, with an emphasis on choosing the right Azure service for a given scenario.
